pr.title: Mark ft_0CD1 as matching, run ninja apply, fix splits.txt
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2221 marked melee/ft/ft_0CD1.c as Matching in configure.py, adjusted ftdevice OSReport strings, renamed two item split entries to semantic item filenames, and changed one local .sdata2 float symbol label. The bot report showed small matched/linked progress and 23 new matches, mainly in ityoshitongue, ityoshiegglay, and ftdevice .data.

key_files.role: Changed ft_0CD1 object status from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk around MatchingFor, Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/ft_0CD1.c") -> Object(Matching, "melee/ft/ft_0CD1.c")

key_files.role: Updated two OSReport message literals in ftCo_800C06E8 and ftCo_800C0764.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftCo_800C06E8 report string changed from coll to wind
raw_diff: ftCo_800C0764 report string changed from coll to catch
text_corpus: bot report lists main/melee/ft/ftdevice .data from 50.27% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Renamed item split entries while preserving section address ranges.
Changed one local .sdata2 float symbol label.

what_changed.text: Marked melee/ft/ft_0CD1.c as Matching in the MatchingFor object list.
Adjusted ftdevice report strings from a generic coll message to wind and catch messages for two device-check functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c hunks for ftCo_800C06E8 and ftCo_800C0764

what_changed.text: Updated splits.txt item object paths from address-style filenames to ityoshitongue.c and ityoshiegglay.c without changing the shown section ranges.
Renamed local .sdata2 float symbol ftCo_804D8EF8 to @183.
Bot report recorded +1532 matched-code bytes, +2060 linked-code bytes, +232 matched-data bytes, and 23 new matches.

smart_moves.text: Kept the code match status change paired with generated metadata updates from apply output, including split names and a local symbol label.
evidence_refs: PR title: Mark ft_0CD1 as matching, run ninja apply, fix splits.txt

smart_moves.text: Corrected literal OSReport text in ftdevice rather than adding new data aliases or storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/ft/ftdevice.c report string literal changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: When marking an object Matching, inspect and include the narrow metadata churn produced by apply/report tooling, especially splits.txt and local symbol labels that can affect reported unit ownership.
evidence_refs: PR title: run ninja apply, fix splits.txt
raw_diff: splits.txt and symbols.txt metadata updates
text_corpus: bot report lists new matches in renamed item units

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small string-literal corrections can be sufficient to close data matching for a file section when the report strings are part of the owned data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftdevice OSReport strings changed to wind and catch
text_corpus: bot report lists main/melee/ft/ftdevice .data from 50.27% to 100.00%

naming_conventions.name: ityoshitongue.c
naming_conventions.convention: This PR changed the split entry from address-style it_2F2B.c to semantic item filename ityoshitongue.c.

naming_conventions.name: ityoshiegglay.c
naming_conventions.convention: This PR changed the split entry from address-style it_27CF.c to semantic item filename ityoshiegglay.c.
This PR replaced ftCo_804D8EF8 with a local numbered float label at the same .sdata2 address.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Flip object status from NonMatching to Matching after tool/report confirmation.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows matched-code and linked-code increases

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use exact report string literals to improve data-section matching rather than introducing extra named data.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists ftdevice .data reaching 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Update split ownership names to the semantic unit names used by the matching report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt renamed it_2F2B.c and it_27CF.c entries
text_corpus: bot report lists main/melee/it/items/ityoshitongue and main/melee/it/items/ityoshiegglay matches

fighter chk device catch func num over
follow_up_queries: ftdevice OSReport wind catch coll func num over

notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments in the loaded slice.
The bot report is available and supports reported match deltas, but no manual objdiff logs or author explanation are present.
The title mentions running ninja apply; the slice does not include command output beyond the bot report and diff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Matching status changes may require apply-generated metadata fixes
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2221, marking ft_0CD1.c as Matching was accompanied by splits.txt path updates and a symbols.txt local float-label update; the bot report then recorded matched/linked progress and new item-unit matches.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Exact report strings can close owned data
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2221 changed two ftdevice OSReport literals and the bot report showed ftdevice .data moving from 50.27% to 100.00%. Treat this as PR-specific evidence that literal text accuracy mattered for this data match.

source_update_candidates.title: Item split path rename: it_2F2B.c to ityoshitongue.c
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2221 changed the GALE01 split entry melee/it/items/it_2F2B.c to melee/it/items/ityoshitongue.c for text 0x802F2BFC-0x802F2D98, data 0x803F9480-0x803F9490, and sdata2 0x804DDA08-0x804DDA10.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential durable path/split fact; curator should verify current source and source-ownership context before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Item split path rename: it_27CF.c to ityoshiegglay.c
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2221 changed the GALE01 split entry melee/it/items/it_27CF.c to melee/it/items/ityoshiegglay.c for text 0x802F2F34-0x802F3394, data 0x803F94A0-0x803F94D0, and sdata2 0x804DDA18-0x804DDA30.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential durable path/split fact; curator should verify current source and source-ownership context before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Local .sdata2 float label at 0x804D8EF8 changed to @183
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2221 changed config/GALE01/symbols.txt at .sdata2:0x804D8EF8 from ftCo_804D8EF8 to @183, retaining type object, size 0x4, local scope, align 4, and data:float.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible symbol metadata fact; curator should verify against current symbols and avoid treating it as a global naming convention without more evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all ftdevice asserts should remain raw __assert from this PR; the diff only changes OSReport literals.
Do not infer that semantic item filenames are globally preferred over address-style names without checking current path facts and surrounding item source.
Do not claim ft_0CD1.c source body changes or specific function matches from this slice; no ft_0CD1.c diff is included.
